name: Web Rhythm Game UI
description: Step 23: Complete Perspective & Texture Sync. Mathematically matched the Canvas projection and CSS 3D floor perspective using a shared focal length (250px) and vanish point (250px). Replaced the slanted floor with a true 90-degree perspective plane, syncing texture scrolling speed exactly (1 Z-unit = 1px) to make notes appear glued to the track. Added bright glowing white side-rails for a polished professional look.
